title: Eclipse-Class Dreadnought
content:
The Eclipse-class dreadnought was a heavy capital ship produced by [[United Equus]] during the Great War. Easily the single most formidable ship fielded by the [[Equus Star Navy]] in the war, only two were ever constructed due to the great costs involved. A notable break from typical Equestrian ship design tradition, the Eclipse-class was designed to be an instrument of both psychological and traditional warfare. The namesake ship of its class, the Eclipse was launched in 2436, and served under the direct command of Admiral Nebula Bolt, the designer of the Eclipse-class and many other of Equus' starships.

A second ship, the Penumbra (later rechristened as the Eclipse II), was built in secret as a part of the Pegas War Fleet.

The Eclipse-class was equipped with three superlaser cannons on it's underside, intended for use against enemy capital ships, like the A-1 supercruiser, but could easily be used against civilian targets, and carried enough firepower to level a city in a single blast, as first demonstrated during the Battle of Caren Prime. The Eclipse-class continued to be used even centuries after the Great War, a testament to it's effectiveness.

Notable vessels

  • [[ESS Eclipse (ESN-EX-01)|ESS Eclipse]]: Launched 2436, Equus Orbital Yards. Registered as MIA in 2450, reappeared in 2962 as part of the Nightmare Fleet.
  • ESS Penumbra: Completed in 2446 (never formally launched), Pegus Automated Shipyard. Activated in 2962 as part of the Nightmare Fleet. Later renamed as the Eclipse II.
